description_long: This house features a rectangular footprint with a prominent, steeply pitched hip roof in a neutral gray color. The exterior walls are a mix of dark and light tones, with the front facade showcasing a combination of stone and dark paneling, as well as multiple windows and two main entry doors. The property is enclosed by a low perimeter wall, and the front includes a gated driveway and small landscaped areas. The rear and side facades have fewer windows and simpler detailing, with some utility features visible. The house appears to be a duplex or semi-detached design, with mirrored living spaces on either side of a central dividing wall. The overall style is modern suburban, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, rectangular duplex house with a steep hip roof, stone and dark panel exterior, gated driveway, and symmetrical front entryways.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long, dark wall with minimal windows and the full length of the hip roof.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the gated driveway, two main entry doors, symmetrical windows, and landscaped areas.
description_view_2: Rear view with light stone walls, blue doors, and fewer windows, showing the back of the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more windows, some greenery, and the continuation of the hip roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Double main entry doors with small steps, sheltered by overhangs, and flanked by windows and a gated driveway.
